title: Sharky's Additions
description: Large Collection of Resource Packs and Nice Aesthetic  Changes
body:
**Welcome to Sharky's Additions!**

This is A Pack used to Combine a number of other packs...it also adds a number of custom stuff

**Custom Additions**
- Duck Goat Horns with Custom Sounds
- Canoe Jungle Boats
- Sunglasses Carved Pumpkin
- Multicolored Nautilus
- Better Worldborder
- And a lot More!

**Other Pack Additions [NOT MADE BY ME]**
- Itsme64's No Potion Particles
- Krista's Better Walls
- ekkzz's Straight Swords
- GabrielDja's GUI Purple OLED
- Latvian's Slightly Improved Font
- dihogen's Shark Totem
- Micha_Rei's Sea Puppy Dolphins
- Vanilla Tweaks
- Brooksie's Shiba Inu Dog
